> 3 render commits" recommendation was too blunt: cross-referencing our fixes vs `orsc` vs the **Jagex
> clean decompile (ground truth)** showed (a) **3 genuine forward-ports** where we're uniquely correct
> and `orsc` builds wrong/zero geometry ŌĆö under-roof cull, id-74 sail lift, and the diagonal
> scenery-object/door band (48001ŌĆō59999); (b) our render-diff **tooling is complementary** (re-port,
> don't discard); (c) the terrain/wall "fidelity fixes" were repairing *our own* prior bugs to a parity
> `orsc` already had (redundant); and (d) a few spots where `orsc` is more correct (adopt). The revised,
> work-preserving integration (keep all docs/tooling/fixtures, forward-port the 3 + retarget tooling
> onto `orsc`, adopt `orsc` where it wins) is in RENDER_RECONCILIATION.md. The per-commit conflict
> mechanics below remain accurate.

# Rebase onto origin/main (render/orsc) ŌĆö plan

## 0. Divergence summary

- **merge-base** = `3a384ec`; **origin/main** = `9ff7a69` (**3 upstream commits** ahead); **our tip** = `a8ab7d4` (**11 commits** ahead on `deob/rsc-client-reference`).
- Upstream rewrote the renderer: **deleted** the classic software renderer (`render/{boundary,camera,facesort,model,palette,pick,rasterize,roof,scene,scenery,surface,terrain,textures,textures_test}.go`), **added** `render/orsc/*`, and **gutted** the survivors `render/render.go` (574ŌåÆ32 lines, ŌłÆ542) plus `render/{entity,entitysprite,itemsprite,sprites}.go`.
- **Only `render/` overlaps.** Upstream touched only `render/`, `assets/`, `facts/`, `cmd/{cradle,scenariogen,rendertest}`, `examples/scenarios/`, `docs/{render-engine,tasks}.md`, and root `.gitignore`. It **did not touch `reference/` at all.**
- **8 of our 11 commits are CLEAN** (touch only `reference/`). **3 are render commits and ALL conflict**: `24495c5`, `276b58a`, `a8ab7d4` ŌĆö modify/delete conflicts on deleted files, content conflicts on the survivors, and the survivors are **build-breaks regardless of resolution** (they call deleted `Scene`/`Surface`/`TerrainHeights`).

## 2. File-level conflict list (render commits only)

### `24495c5` ŌĆö render-diff tool
- **Content conflict** ŌĆö `render/render.go` (survives on origin/main; upstream deleted the `buildScene`/scene-assembly body our hunk extends).
- **Modify/delete** ŌĆö `render/terrain.go` (deleted upstream, we modify ŌåÆ "version 24495c5 left in tree").
- **New-file build-breaks** (apply clean, won't compile vs orsc): `render/dump.go`, `render/dump_faces.go`. Net-new dirs `cmd/renderdiff/{main,diff,selftest_test}.go`, `internal/rscdump/{landscape,schema}.go`, `internal/rscdump/gen/*` apply clean (paths absent on origin/main) but depend on the deleted `render` API.

### `276b58a` ŌĆö fidelity fixes + JAR oracle
- **Content conflict** ŌĆö root `.gitignore` (upstream and our hunk both append after `/scenariogen` ŌåÆ overlapping hunks).
- **Modify/delete (├Ś5)** ŌĆö `render/{boundary,roof,scenery,terrain,dump}.go` (all deleted upstream).
- **New-file build-breaks**: `render/fidelity_{scenery,terrain,walls}_test.go` (call deleted render API). `testdata/rscdump/**` + `internal/rscdump/gen/rooftrace/main.go` apply clean.

### `a8ab7d4` ŌĆö diagonal objects (World.addModels)
- **Content conflict** ŌĆö `render/render.go` (our hunk adds the diagonal-objects pass into the same gutted `buildScene` region).
- **New-file build-break** ŌĆö `render/diagobj.go`, `render/fidelity_diagobj_test.go`.
- **NOT conflicts** (false positives in isolated single-commit replay; clean in a real sequential rebase because earlier commits already added them): `internal/rscdump/landscape.go`, `internal/rscdump/schema.go`, `reference/.../RENDER_FIDELITY_FINDINGS.md`. `pathfind/landscape.go` auto-merges clean.

### Net render conflict set (real sequential rebase)
- **Content conflicts (3):** `render/render.go` (at `24495c5` and again at `a8ab7d4`), root `.gitignore` (at `276b58a`).
- **Modify/delete conflicts:** `render/{terrain,boundary,roof,scenery,dump}.go`.
- **Build-breaking new files (5):** `render/dump.go`, `render/dump_faces.go`, `render/diagobj.go`, and the 4 `render/fidelity_*_test.go`.

**Critical correctness note:** `render/render.go` survives but is gutted (ŌłÆ542 lines removing `buildScene`, `Scene`, `Surface`, `TerrainHeights`). Our edits insert code into that exact removed region and call those now-deleted symbols. **Even resolving the content conflict by "take ours" yields a tree that does not compile.** These render edits are obsolete against the new renderer.

## 3. Recommended strategy: Option B ŌĆö interactive rebase that DROPS the 3 render commits

The render edits patch a renderer upstream deleted; "take ours" won't compile against `render/orsc`. Carrying them forward is conflict-churn for a tree that won't build. **Drop them; re-land the valuable render-diff tooling as fresh work on top of orsc** (per ┬¦3 of UPSTREAM_RENDER_DELTA.md).

```
git checkout deob/rsc-client-reference
git rebase --onto origin/main 3a384ec deob/rsc-client-reference -i
```

Todo list ŌĆö **`drop`** the three render commits, **`pick`** the eight clean ones:

```
pick   a803796   # deob snapshot       (clean)
pick   960310c   # deob comb-over      (clean)
pick   d2db342   # deob full-expand    (clean)
pick   5b78e9b   # docs INDEX          (clean)
drop   24495c5   # render-diff tool    <-- DROP (obsolete vs orsc; re-port tooling)
pick   b0a21df   # build-options docs  (clean)
pick   4f97ecc   # subsystem compile   (clean)
pick   2b2af58   # milestone-2 docs    (clean)
drop   276b58a   # fidelity fixes      <-- DROP (5 moot, 2 re-port)
pick   33e7226   # Mudclient net fix   (clean)
drop   a8ab7d4   # diagonal objects    <-- DROP (re-port onto orsc; high value)
```

Result: a **conflict-free** rebase of the 8 deob/docs/net commits onto orsc. Then re-land the still-useful parts as **fresh commits targeting `render/orsc`** ŌĆö `internal/rscdump` and `cmd/renderdiff` are largely renderer-agnostic and salvageable; coordinate with the colleague's `render/orsc/harness.go` rather than re-introducing `render/dump.go` wholesale.

### Alternative: Option A ŌĆö straight `--onto` keeping all 11 (NOT recommended)

```
git rebase --onto origin/main 3a384ec deob/rsc-client-reference
```

Expect to stop at three commits. Per-stop resolution:
- **`24495c5`**: `git rm render/terrain.go`; for `render/render.go` drop our hunk (take-ours won't compile ŌĆö `Scene`/`Surface`/`TerrainHeights` gone); `git rm render/dump.go render/dump_faces.go` (build-break vs orsc); keep `cmd/renderdiff`/`internal/rscdump` but they won't compile until re-pointed. `git rebase --continue`.
- **`276b58a`**: `git rm render/{boundary,roof,scenery,terrain,dump}.go`; resolve `.gitignore` by hand (keep both upstream's block AND our `.claude/`+`/renderdiff` lines); `git rm render/fidelity_*_test.go`. `git rebase --continue`.
- **`a8ab7d4`**: drop our `render/render.go` hunk; `git rm render/diagobj.go render/fidelity_diagobj_test.go`. `git rebase --continue`.

Option A's end state equals Option B's (all render edits dropped) but reached through manual conflict resolution that leaves dangling build-broken tool files ŌĆö strictly worse than the clean interactive drop. **Use Option B.**

## 4. Ordering / safety prerequisite (BLOCKING)

The in-flight **subsystem-compile workflow** has **uncommitted changes in the MAIN working tree** under `reference/rsc-client/src`. A rebase requires a clean tree and that uncommitted work is otherwise unprotected. **Do not start the rebase until that workflow has committed and the tree is clean.**

```
# in /home/free/code/rsc-hacking/westworld (main tree)
git status                                 # MUST be clean before proceeding
git stash push -u                          # or commit the in-flight work first
git rev-parse deob/rsc-client-reference    # confirm tip == a8ab7d4 before/after
```

- The 8 clean commits are independent of the renderer; they replay without touching `render/orsc`.
- The **rscplus JAR-oracle harness** lives in a **separate repo** (`/home/free/code/rsc-hacking/rscplus` @ `b4f942b`) and is **unaffected** by this rebase ŌĆö no action, no coordination needed.
- The **deob commits (`reference/`) are unaffected** ŌĆö upstream never touched `reference/`, so all 8 clean commits rebase without conflict.

---

## 5. What becomes of our render-diff tooling

- **Re-port onto orsc** (do NOT discard): `internal/rscdump/{schema,landscape}.go`, `cmd/renderdiff/{main,diff}.go`, the `BuiltFace` type, the JAR-oracle leg ŌĆö these are renderer-agnostic and carry forward almost verbatim.
- **Retarget the Go-engine leg** (`render/dump.go`, `render/dump_faces.go`) from the deleted classic API to `orsc.RenderView`/`orsc.Scene` (full sketch in UPSTREAM_RENDER_DELTA.md ┬¦3).
- **Re-implement the diagonal-object pass** (`render/diagobj.go`) as orsc's missing `World.addModels` (high value ŌĆö fixes the cradle-perceptibility bug) plus the id-74 sail lift.
- **Coordinate with `render/orsc/harness.go`**: the colleague built the render half of a two-engine diff; our `renderdiff` is the missing diff half. Extend/feed the harness rather than re-introducing a parallel `render/dump.go`.

---

## 6. Step-by-step execution checklist (run when ready)

1. **Confirm the in-flight subsystem-compile workflow is done and committed.** In the main tree `/home/free/code/rsc-hacking/westworld`: `git status` MUST be clean (commit or `git stash push -u` any `reference/rsc-client/src` changes first).
2. **Record the starting tip:** `git rev-parse deob/rsc-client-reference` ŌåÆ expect `a8ab7d4`. Tag a safety ref: `git branch backup/pre-orsc-rebase a8ab7d4`.
3. **Fetch + confirm upstream:** `git fetch origin`; `git rev-parse origin/main` ŌåÆ expect `9ff7a69`; `git merge-base origin/main deob/rsc-client-reference` ŌåÆ expect `3a384ec`.
4. **Start the interactive rebase:** `git checkout deob/rsc-client-reference && git rebase --onto origin/main 3a384ec deob/rsc-client-reference -i`.
5. **Edit the todo list** to `drop` `24495c5`, `276b58a`, `a8ab7d4` and `pick` the other 8 (per ┬¦3). Save and exit. Expect **zero conflict stops.**
6. **Verify the rebased branch:**
   - `git log --oneline origin/main..deob/rsc-client-reference` ŌåÆ expect **8 commits**.
   - `git diff --stat origin/main..deob/rsc-client-reference -- render/` ŌåÆ expect **empty** (no render edits remain).
   - `go build ./...` ŌåÆ MUST pass on orsc.
   - `go test ./...` (or at minimum `go vet ./...`) ŌåÆ sanity check.
7. **Re-land the salvaged tooling as fresh commits on orsc** (per ┬¦5): retarget `dump.go`/`dump_faces.go`, re-implement `diagobj.go` + id-74 lift, wire `renderdiff` into `render/orsc/harness.go`. Each as its own commit with passing `go build`.
8. **Drop the safety ref** once verified: `git branch -D backup/pre-orsc-rebase` (only after CI/build is green).

If anything goes wrong mid-rebase: `git rebase --abort`, then `git reset --hard backup/pre-orsc-rebase` to restore the original tip.
